summary: Use Google Sheets to read, append, update, and manage spreadsheet data inside an n8n workflow.
description: This node connects n8n workflows to Google Sheets operations. It is suited for reading spreadsheet data, writing rows, updating existing content, and using spreadsheet-backed automation patterns.
why_use_it: Use this node when the workflow needs native Google Sheets operations instead of a generic HTTP call.
when_to_use: when you need to read rows from a sheet
when you need to append workflow results to a spreadsheet
when you need to update structured tabular data
when_not_to_use: when the required Google Sheets API operation is not exposed by the node
when a completely custom Google API call is needed and must be handled through HTTP Request

credentials.notes: Use configured Google credentials supported by n8n.

node_parameters: mapping between input fields and columns
templates_examples: spreadsheet-backed workflow examples from the official node page
unsupported_ops_guidance: If the needed Google Sheets API operation is unsupported by the node, consider HTTP Request with appropriate credentials and API details.
limitations: bounded by the operations exposed by the official node
custom API edge cases may require HTTP Request
gotchas: be careful with row matching logic during updates
confirm sheet and column mapping before bulk writes

selection_rules: Prefer this node when the user explicitly wants Google Sheets operations supported by n8n.
Prefer HTTP Request only when a required Sheets API operation is unavailable here.
disambiguation: This is an action node, not a trigger.
Use this instead of generic spreadsheet phrasing when Google Sheets is explicitly named.
